item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: Gun accessory maker to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims’ families
item.description: A Georgia gun accessory maker will pay $1.75 million to victims' families of the 2022 Buffalo mass shooting and halt New York sales of its MA Lock dev...

item.title: Expert credits Trump tax certainty for economic confidence, Americans returning to workforce
item.description: The American workforce rebounds with unexpected job gains in January, signaling economic momentum as labor participation rises across demographics nat...

item.title: US economy added 130K jobs in January, delayed report shows
item.description: The U.S. economy added jobs at a steady pace to start the year, as the Labor Department reported that employers hired 130,000 workers in January 2026,...

item.title: FAA lifts El Paso flight restriction after US disables Mexican cartel drones that 'breached US airspace'
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration walked back an order grounding all flights to and from the El Paso International Airport on Wednesday.
